title: Re-add int64 casts for ctime to fix 32-bit build
body: The variables here are 64-bit on 64-bit builds, so the linter recommends stripping them. Unfortunately, they're 32-bit on 32-bit builds, so stripping them breaks that. Readd with a nolint to convince it to not break.

comments.body:

Needs approval from an approver in each of these files: - ~~[OWNERS](https://github.com/containers/libpod/blob/master/OWNERS)~~ [mheon] Approvers can indicate their approval by writing `/approve` in a comment Approvers can cancel approval by writing `/approve cancel` in a comment

The new failure now is:
```
_build/src/github.com/containers/libpod/libpod/stats.go:90:17: invalid operation: cgroupLimit > physicalLimit (mismatched types uint64 and uint32)
_build/src/github.com/containers/libpod/libpod/stats.go:91:3: cannot use physicalLimit (type uint32) as type uint64 in return argument
```
